documentSeries.headerHint: Pulled automatically from this organization's Delivery note settings — edit it there, not here.

documentSeries.numberingHint: Can only be set once — applying it locks the series permanently.

quotes.title: Quotes
quotes.deleteConfirm: Delete the quote for "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
quotes.noPdf: No PDF available — check that a storage connection is configured in Quote settings.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.deleteConfirm: Delete the invoice for "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
invoices.noPdf: No PDF available — check that a storage connection is configured in Invoice settings.
invoices.disclaimer: Basic record-keeping — no payment gateway is connected yet, so "paid" is set manually. Not a certified tax invoice (חשבונית מס); confirm compliance with your accountant before relying on this as the official invoicing system.
